allow: PowerShell($txt = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\chatmod_inspect\\ChatComponent.txt"; $start = \($txt | Select-String "forEachLine\\\(net"\).LineNumber; if \($start\) { $txt[\($start-1\)..\($start+120\)] -join "`n" } else { $txt | Select-String "forEachLine" | Select-Object -First 5 })

PowerShell($jar = "C:\\Users\\gusen\\.gradle\\caches\\fabric-loom\\minecraftMaven\\net\\minecraft\\minecraft-clientonly\\1.21.11-loom.mappings.1_21_11.layered+hash.2198-v2\\minecraft-clientonly-1.21.11-loom.mappings.1_21_11.layered+hash.2198-v2.jar"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($jar\); foreach \($e in $zip.Entries\) { if \($e.FullName -eq 'net/minecraft/client/gui/GuiGraphics.class' -or $e.FullName -eq 'com/mojang/blaze3d/font/GlyphInfo.class'\) { [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::ExtractToFile\($e, "$env:TEMP\\chatmod_inspect\\$\($e.Name\)", $true\) } }; $zip.Dispose\(\); javap -p "$env:TEMP\\chatmod_inspect\\GuiGraphics.class" | Select-String "blit"; javap -p "$env:TEMP\\chatmod_inspect\\GlyphInfo.class" | Select-String "simple")

PowerShell(curl.exe -s "https://api.ivr.fi/v2/twitch/emotes/global" -o "$env:TEMP\\twitch_global.json"; $g = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\twitch_global.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; \($g | Measure-Object\).Count; $g | Select-Object -First 3 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3)

PowerShell("A:"; curl.exe -s "https://api.ivr.fi/v2/twitch/emotes/channel/nymn" | Select-Object -First 1; "B:"; curl.exe -s "https://api.ivr.fi/v2/twitch/emotes?channel=nymn" | Select-Object -First 1; "C:"; curl.exe -s "https://api.ivr.fi/twitch/emotes/channel?channel=nymn" | Select-Object -First 1)

PowerShell("A:"; curl.exe -s "https://api.ivr.fi/v2/twitch/emotes/global" | Select-Object -First 1; "B:"; curl.exe -s "https://api.ivr.fi/v2/twitch/emotes/channel/twitch" | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(400, $_.Length\)\) }; "C:"; curl.exe -s "https://api.ivr.fi/v2/twitch/emotes/sets?set_id=0" | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(600, $_.Length\)\) })
